creator: anthropic.com

evidence.text: "Claude has brought the analysis time down massively," Gupta added. "It's still on our team to monitor, evaluate, and assess the insights, and communicate the ‘so what’ to external stakeholders." The reach points back to the owners PCV serves, most of them small businesses without the HR teams larger companies rely on to hear their people. Workers tell an anonymous survey things they would never say to their boss, and PCV packages those responses, names stripped out, into feedback loops around retention and satisfaction that owners can act on.
